record.field: Wellhub: conciliar liquidación mensual con cargo bancario

# Crea/actualiza el wellhub.settlement del mes anterior si tiene cargo bancario asociado from datetime import date from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta
today = date.today() prev = (today.replace(day=1) - relativedelta(months=1)) period = prev.strftime("%Y-%m")
for cfg in env["wellhub.config"].search([("active", "=", True)]): company_id = cfg.company_id.id # Buscar check-ins del mes anterior sin settlement asignado Checkin = env["wellhub.checkin"].sudo() period_start = prev.strftime("%Y-%m-01 00:00:00") period_end = today.strftime("%Y-%m-01 00:00:00") checkins = Checkin.search([ ("company_id", "=", company_id), ("checkin_at", ">=", period_start), ("checkin_at", "<", period_end), ])
# Crear/buscar settlement Settlement = env["wellhub.settlement"].sudo() s = Settlement.search([("company_id", "=", company_id), ("period", "=", period)], limit=1) if not s: s = Settlement.create({ "company_id": company_id, "period": period, "precio_unitario_aplicado": cfg.precio_unitario_default, }) # Asignar check-ins checkins.sudo().write({"settlement_id": s.id})
# Buscar cargo bancario que coincida (transferencia de partner Wellhub en el mes corriente) if cfg.bank_concept_pattern and not s.bank_line_id: BankLine = env["account.bank.statement.line"].sudo() domain = [ ("company_id", "=", company_id), ("date", ">=", today.replace(day=1).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")), ("payment_ref", "ilike", cfg.bank_concept_pattern), ] bl = BankLine.search(domain, order="date asc", limit=1) if bl: s.write({ "bank_line_id": bl.id, "importe_recibido": abs(bl.amount), }) cfg.write({"last_settlement_at": today})
